codeReview.summary: The prior locale-determinism blocker is fixed, but the XML-safety repair is incomplete: Claude/Hermes still emit raw key-file and key-command text inside `<context_pack>`, so XML-sensitive content can still break the envelope.

issues.description: Only `session.bodyText` is XML-escaped here, but the Key Files/Key Commands sections are still inserted raw inside `<context_pack>`. Any `&`, `<`, `>`, `"`, or `'` in a filename or command (for example `build && test` or `foo<bar>`) can still invalidate Claude/Hermes exports, so the XML-safety blocker is not fully resolved.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The expected mission artifact set for this review was not present in the snapshot, so the worker handoff/transcript procedure could not be audited directly.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `/Users/albertonunez/Documents/Windsurf/BurnBar/.factory/validation/m1-context-pack-core` only contains `scrutiny/`; searches for `features.json`, `worker-transcripts.jsonl`, and `handoffs/` under `.factory/validation` returned no results for this mission.

summary: Fail: the locale blocker is gone, but Claude/Hermes envelopes still aren't safe for XML-sensitive key files/commands.
